requirements.task_name: Select the cheapest work-from-home starter plan under $150 with 1-on-1 coaching and 5+ modules
requirements.task_description: From the pricing section, find starter plans under $150 that include 1-on-1 coaching and at least 5 training modules, then select the cheapest qualifying plan and begin the sign-up process with your contact details entered.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time searchStarterPlans is called, after the filtered and sorted results array has been computed.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object with the last-used plan search parameters: { maxPrice, includesOneOnOneCoaching, minTrainingModulesCount, onlyStarterPlans, sortBy }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user searched for starter plans under $150 with 1-on-1 coaching and at least 5 modules, sorted by price low to high, rather than reaching the plan via some other path.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest evening intro webinar within the next 14 days
requirements.task_description: Find an introductory work-from-home overview webinar scheduled on a weekday evening (6pm–9pm) within the next 14 days, and complete the on-site registration form for the earliest available option.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time searchWebinars is called, after filtering and sorting are applied.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object with the last-used webinar search parameters: { startDate, endDate, timeOfDay, topicTypes, sortBy }.
required_variables.reason: Enables verification that the user searched within the correct date range, selected the evening time-of-day and appropriate introductory topic type, and sorted by earliest date first before registering for the webinar at the top of the filtered list.

requirements.task_name: Create and save an earnings plan targeting at least $2,000/month using the calculator
requirements.task_description: Open the earnings calculator, input specific values for hours per week, average sale value, monthly leads, and conversion rate, then calculate and save a plan configured to aim for at least $2,000 in estimated monthly income.

requirements.task_name: Choose the highest-earning program requiring under 10 hours/week with 3+ live sessions
requirements.task_description: From the programs section, filter for work-from-home business tracks that require up to 10 hours per week and include at least 3 live group sessions per month, then select and favorite the program with the highest listed average monthly earnings and create a basic account to save it.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time searchPrograms is called, after the filtered and sorted results array has been computed.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object with the last-used program search parameters: { maxHoursPerWeek, includesLiveGroupSessions, minLiveSessionsPerMonth, sortBy }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the search limited programs to those requiring up to 10 hours/week, including at least 3 live sessions per month, sorted by average monthly earnings high-to-low before the user favorited the top program.

requirements.task_name: Save the most recent success story of a parent earning $2,500+ per month working 20–30 hours/week
requirements.task_description: Browse success stories and filter to find parents who work 20–30 hours per week and earn at least $2,500 per month, then open the most recent story and save it to a reading list using the guest option.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time searchSuccessStories is called, after the filtered and sorted results array has been computed.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object with the last-used success-story search parameters: { lifestyle, minMonthlyEarnings, minHoursPerWeek, maxHoursPerWeek, sortBy }.
required_variables.reason: Enables verification that the user filtered for parents with at least $2,500 in monthly earnings, working 20–30 hours/week, sorted by most recent before bookmarking the top result as a guest.

requirements.task_name: Submit a part-time application with a $300 monthly budget starting April 1, 2026
requirements.task_description: Open the application form from the landing page, select a part-time availability option, set a maximum monthly budget of $300, choose April 1, 2026 as the preferred start date, pick exactly two interest areas, and submit the completed application.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to a weekly newsletter focused on Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy
requirements.task_description: Access the newsletter preferences page from the footer, configure a weekly frequency with morning delivery, select only Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy topics, adjust content type settings, and submit the subscription form.

requirements.task_name: Ask support about extending the 30-day money-back guarantee to 60 days
requirements.task_description: Use the FAQ search to find the refund policy that mentions a 30-day money-back guarantee, then open the contact form from that section and send a billing-related question requesting a 60-day guarantee, including your name and email.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time searchFAQArticles is called, after the search has been executed.
required_variables.value_to_set: The normalized search query string used for the FAQ search (e.g., the `query` argument trimmed and lowercased).
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user searched the FAQ using the query 'refund' (or equivalent) as specified in the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getFAQArticleDetails is called and returns a non-null article.
required_variables.value_to_set: The `faqArticleId` argument of the last successfully retrieved FAQ article.
required_variables.reason: Enables verification that the user opened the FAQ article whose content mentions the 30-day money-back guarantee before proceeding to contact support from that section.
